name: Beef Stroganooff Casserole
recipeIngredient: 1 can (10 3/4 oz.) cream of mushroom soup, undiluted
Radish slices and fresh Italian parsley - optional
recipeInstructions:
1. Preheat oven to 350°F (175°C).
2. Spray a 13x9 inch baking dish with nonstick cooking spray.
3. Place the beef in a large skillet; sprinkle with salt and pepper. Brown the beef over medium-high heat until no longer pink, stirring to separate the beef. Drain the fat from the skillet; set aside the beef.
4. Heat oil in the same skillet over medium-high heat until hot. Add mushrooms, onion, and garlic; cook and stir for 2 minutes or until the onion is tender. Add wine. Reduce heat to medium-low and simmer for 3 minutes. Remove from heat; stir in soup, sour cream, and mustard until well combined. Return the beef to the skillet.
5. Place noodles in the prepared dish. Pour the beef mixture over the noodles; stir until the noodles are well coated.
6. Bake uncovered for 30 minutes or until heated through. Sprinkle with chopped parsley if desired. Garnish with radish slices and fresh Italian parsley sprigs, if desired. Makes 6 servings.
